creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Looks like maintainer pushed independent (I'm saying "independent" 'cause of new timestamp difference in distinfo between patch attached here and actual git commit) update recently: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/ftp/curl?id=7026df49e83a3acffed2b2df48e65de541cf425b

Interesting why commit-hook didn't post here anything. Anyway, looks like this PR can be closed with "Overcome by events" resolution.
